generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a fellow American who values both our security and our freedoms, I've been concerned about how our alliances are being handled. Did you know that just last year, our European partners only met 68% of their defense spending commitments? Meanwhile, we're stretching our budget thin to maintain global stability. It's time we have an honest conversation about fair burden-sharing. Our troops deserve better, and our taxpayers deserve accountability. #StrongAlliances #FairBurdenSharing
